issues.title: [Epic · Week 3] Core wiki experience
issues.outcome: Complete the core wiki experience outcome without pulling later platform work into the current gate.
scope: Own the phase dependency order.
Surface risks and scope cuts.
Close the phase only with evidence.
acceptanceCriteria: Every child issue has a clear owner, milestone, and acceptance criteria.
Blocked work is represented using issue dependencies.
The phase gate has explicit evidence.
definitionOfDone: Relevant documentation and tests are updated.
No unreviewed legal, accessibility, security, or performance exception is introduced.

issues.title: [Epic · Weeks 3–4] Public wiki pages and related-entity product flow
issues.outcome: Deliver a coherent player-facing wiki flow across the homepage, catalog, songs, packs, partners, story, and game topics.
scope: Own shared page templates and related-entity navigation.
Keep content sourced from the validated static catalog.
Require accessibility, responsive, and image states on every page.
acceptanceCriteria: Home → explore → entity detail flow works.
Every page shows provenance/review status where appropriate.
No page depends on chart runtime.
definitionOfDone: Relevant documentation and tests are updated.
No unreviewed legal, accessibility, security, or performance exception is introduced.

issues.title: [Week 3 · Feature] Homepage for latest release/event, discovery, and project/game introduction
issues.outcome: Create a useful landing page centered on current game information and fast entry into the catalog.
scope: Latest release/event module.
Featured songs, packs, partners, and story links.
Concise project and game introduction.
Search entry point, update status, legal disclaimer, and contribution path.
Complete loading/empty/offline/error states.
acceptanceCriteria: Latest content comes from versioned catalog data.
Primary discovery actions are visible without scrolling excessively.
Hero art remains readable, responsive, licensed, and performant.
Keyboard and screen-reader flow is tested.
definitionOfDone: Relevant documentation and tests are updated.
No unreviewed legal, accessibility, security, or performance exception is introduced.

issues.title: [Week 3 · Feature] Fast explore search, sort, filters, and shareable URL state
issues.outcome: Let ordinary players efficiently find songs and related content using a compact, responsive catalog experience.
scope: Search title and artist.
Filters for pack, difficulty, level/constant, BPM, and availability.
Sort options and result count.
URL query state, reset, no-results, and stale-index states.
Keyboard-friendly controls and virtualisation only if measurements justify it.
acceptanceCriteria: Refreshing or sharing the URL preserves state.
Initial dataset performs within the agreed budget without premature complexity.
definitionOfDone: Relevant documentation and tests are updated.
No unreviewed legal, accessibility, security, or performance exception is introduced.

issues.title: [Week 3 · Feature] Song and pack detail pages with charts, sources, and related navigation
issues.outcome: Provide high-quality song and pack pages that answer common player questions without exposing chart runtime features.
scope: Song title, artist, jacket if permitted, pack, release, BPM, charts, difficulty, constant/rating, note count, sources, review status, and related entities.
Pack overview and song list.
Missing or uncertain data presentation.
SEO metadata and share preview hooks.
acceptanceCriteria: Every field has a defined source and unknown-value behavior.
No AFF, playback, or analytics control appears.
definitionOfDone: Relevant documentation and tests are updated.
No unreviewed legal, accessibility, security, or performance exception is introduced.
